mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resumes (id, file_name, raw_text, parsed_info_json, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{fileName}, #{rawText}, #{parsedInfoJson}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, file_name AS fileName, raw_text AS rawText, parsed_info_json AS parsedInfoJson, created_at AS createdAt FROM resumes WHERE id = #{id}
